<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Écocurieux – Animation nature & biodiversité</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Nunito:wght@800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --green: #467b43;
    --green-dark: #2c4f2a;
    --brown: #af6a32;
    --beige: #f3deb4;
    --beige-2: #e8c98a;
    --beige-light: #fdf5e6;
    --white: #fff;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: 'Lora', serif; background: var(--beige-light); color: #2c2c2c; overflow-x: hidden; }

  /* ========== NAV ========== */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200;
    background: rgba(44,79,42,0.98);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    padding: 0 2rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    height: 78px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    text-decoration: none; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .nav-logo-img {
    height: 62px; width: 120px;
    border-radius: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--beige);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--beige-2), 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }
  .nav-logo-img img {
    height: 120%; width: auto; object-fit: contain;
    object-position: center center;
  }
  .nav-logo-name {
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 1.25rem; color: var(--beige); letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .nav-logo-sub {
    font-family: 'Lora', serif; font-style: italic;
    font-size: 0.65rem; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.65);
    margin-top: 2px;
  }

  /* Nav links */
  .nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.1rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links > li { position: relative; }
  .nav-links > li > a {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
    color: rgba(243,222,180,0.88); text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 7px 12px; border-radius: 8px;
    transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .nav-links > li > a:hover,
  .nav-links > li:hover > a { background: rgba(243,222,180,0.12); color: var(--beige); }
  .nav-links > li > a .arrow { font-size: 0.5rem; opacity: 0.55; transition: transform 0.2s; }
  .nav-links > li:hover > a .arrow, .nav-links > li:focus-within > a .arrow { transform: rotate(180deg); }

  /* Dropdown */
  .dropdown {
    position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 8px); left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-8px);
    background: var(--green-dark); border: 1px solid rgba(243,222,180,0.15);
    border-radius: 12px; min-width: 230px; padding: 0.5rem;
    box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.25s 0.1s, transform 0.25s 0.1s;
  }
  .nav-links > li:hover .dropdown,
  .nav-links > li:focus-within .dropdown {
    opacity: 1; pointer-events: all;
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
  }
  .dropdown a {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px;
    color: rgba(243,222,180,0.85); text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600;
    transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
  }
  .dropdown a:hover { background: rgba(243,222,180,0.12); color: var(--beige); }
  .dropdown a .dd-icon { font-size: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; }

  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--brown); color: var(--white);
    padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 30px;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700;
    text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
    white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: #8f5228; transform: scale(1.04); }

  /* Hamburger */
  .hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; padding: 5px; }
  .hamburger span { width: 26px; height: 2px; background: var(--beige); border-radius: 2px; display: block; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .mobile-menu {
    display: none; position: fixed; top: 84px; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    background: var(--green-dark); z-index: 99;
    flex-direction: column; padding: 2rem; overflow-y: auto;
  }
  .mobile-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .mm-head { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.38); padding: 1.5rem 0 0.5rem; }
  .mobile-menu a {
    color: var(--beige); text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(243,222,180,0.1);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .mobile-menu a:hover { color: var(--brown); }
  .mm-cta { background: var(--brown); border-radius: 10px; justify-content: center; margin-top: 1.5rem; padding: 14px !important; border-bottom: none !important; }

  /* ========== HERO ========== */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    background:
      linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(44,79,42,0.90) 0%, rgba(70,123,67,0.60) 50%, rgba(44,79,42,0.88) 100%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 60%, rgba(175,106,50,0.3) 0%, transparent 60%);
    background-color: var(--green-dark);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    padding: 100px 2rem 8rem;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image:
      radial-gradient(circle at 20% 80%, rgba(243,222,180,0.06) 0%, transparent 40%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, rgba(175,106,50,0.08) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
    50% { transform: translateY(-20px) rotate(5deg); }
  }
  .hero-content { text-align: center; max-width: 820px; position: relative; z-index: 2; }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-block; background: rgba(243,222,180,0.13); border: 1px solid rgba(243,222,180,0.28);
    color: var(--beige); padding: 6px 18px; border-radius: 30px;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  /* Grand logo hero */
  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 900;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 5.8rem);
    color: var(--beige); line-height: 1.0;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
    text-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  .hero h1 .accent { color: var(--brown); }
  .hero h2 {
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 2.2vw, 1.35rem);
    font-weight: 400; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.80); margin-bottom: 2rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  }
  .hero p { font-size: 1rem; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.70); line-height: 1.78; max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; }
  .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--brown); color: var(--white);
    padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 40px; text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.92rem;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    transition: all 0.3s; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(175,106,50,0.45);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: #8f5228; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(175,106,50,0.55); }
  .btn-outline {
    border: 2px solid rgba(243,222,180,0.45); color: var(--beige);
    padding: 12px 26px; border-radius: 40px; text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.92rem;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(243,222,180,0.1); border-color: var(--beige); }
  .hero-scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2.2rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
    animation: bounce 2.2s ease-in-out infinite; text-decoration: none;
  }
  .hero-scroll .scroll-label {
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.24em;
    color: rgba(243,222,180,0.60);
  }
  .hero-scroll .scroll-arrow { font-size: 2rem; line-height: 1; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.45); }
  @keyframes bounce {
    0%,100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(8px); }
  }

  /* ========== TICKER ========== */
  .ticker {
    background: var(--brown); color: var(--white);
    padding: 13px 0; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .ticker-inner {
    display: inline-flex; gap: 4rem;
    animation: ticker 22s linear infinite;
  }
  .ticker-inner span { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.83rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }

  @keyframes ticker { 0%{transform:translateX(0)} 100%{transform:translateX(-50%)} }

  /* ========== SECTIONS COMMUNES ========== */
  section.padded { padding: 80px 2rem; }
  .section-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label {
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: var(--brown); margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 4vw, 2.9rem);
    font-weight: 900; color: var(--green-dark); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; line-height: 1.08;
  }
  .section-title span { color: var(--brown); }

  /* ========== SERVICES ========== */
  .services { background: var(--beige-light); }
  .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .service-card {
    background: var(--white); border-radius: 20px;
    border: 2px solid var(--beige-2);
    padding: 2rem 1.6rem;
    box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--beige-2);
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .service-card:hover { transform: translate(-3px,-3px); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--beige-2); }
  .service-card.card-green { background: var(--green); border-color: var(--green-dark); box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--green-dark); }
  .service-card.card-green:hover { box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--green-dark); }
  .service-card.card-brown { background: var(--brown); border-color: #8f5228; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 #8f5228; }
  .service-card.card-brown:hover { box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 #8f5228; }
  .service-icon-wrap {
    width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 14px;
    background: var(--beige); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.7rem; margin-bottom: 1.1rem; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 var(--beige-2);
  }
  .card-green .service-icon-wrap, .card-brown .service-icon-wrap { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); box-shadow: none; }
  .service-card h3 { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green-dark); margin-bottom: 0.7rem; }
  .card-green h3, .card-brown h3 { color: var(--white); }
  .service-card p { font-size: 0.87rem; line-height: 1.72; color: #5a5040; }
  .card-green p, .card-brown p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }

  /* ========== DEMARCHE ========== */
  .demarche { background: var(--green-dark); }
  .demarche-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: start; }
  .demarche .section-title { color: var(--beige); }
  .demarche .section-label { color: rgba(243,222,180,0.52); }
  .demarche > .section-inner > .demarche-grid > div:first-child > p {
    color: rgba(243,222,180,0.78); line-height: 1.82; font-size: 0.97rem; margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  /* 3 pilliers */
  .pilliers { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; }
  .pillier {
    background: rgba(243,222,180,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(243,222,180,0.14);
    border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.3rem 1.5rem;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--brown);
  }
  .pillier h4 { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--beige); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .pillier p { font-size: 0.82rem; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.65); line-height: 1.6; }
  .demarche-visual {
    background: rgba(243,222,180,0.06); border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 2.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(243,222,180,0.12);
  }
  .demarche-visual .big-emoji { font-size: 4rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; text-align: center; }
  .demarche-quote {
    border-left: 3px solid var(--brown); padding-left: 1.2rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .demarche-quote p { color: rgba(243,222,180,0.75); font-style: italic; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; }
  .demarche-quote cite { display: block; margin-top: 0.7rem; font-style: normal; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.38); }
  .valeurs-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0.8rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
  .valeur { background: rgba(243,222,180,0.07); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1rem; }
  .valeur .vi { font-size: 1.3rem; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .valeur span { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.85); }

  /* ========== BOITE A IDEES ========== */
  .boite { background: var(--beige-light); }
  .boite-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .univers-card {
    border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden;
    border: 2px solid var(--beige-2);
    box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--beige-2);
    transition: all 0.25s;
    background: var(--white);
  }
  .univers-card:hover { transform: translate(-3px,-3px); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--beige-2); }
  .univers-card.u-green { background: var(--green); border-color: var(--green-dark); box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--green-dark); }
  .univers-card.u-green:hover { box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--green-dark); }
  .univers-card.u-brown { background: var(--brown); border-color: #8f5228; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 #8f5228; }
  .univers-card.u-brown:hover { box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 #8f5228; }
  .univers-head { padding: 1.5rem 1.5rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07); }
  .u-green .univers-head, .u-brown .univers-head { border-bottom-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); }
  .univers-head .u-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .univers-head h3 { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green-dark); }
  .u-green .univers-head h3, .u-brown .univers-head h3 { color: var(--white); }
  .univers-list { padding: 1rem 1.5rem 1.5rem; list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.7rem; }
  .univers-list li { font-size: 0.83rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a5040; display: block; }
  .u-green .univers-list li, .u-brown .univers-list li { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); }
  .univers-list li::before { content: "◆ "; font-size: 0.45rem; color: var(--brown); vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 2px; }
  .u-green .univers-list li::before, .u-brown .univers-list li::before { color: rgba(243,222,180,0.5); }
  .univers-list li strong { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green-dark); display: inline; }
  .u-green .univers-list li strong, .u-brown .univers-list li strong { color: var(--beige); display: inline; }
  .boite-note { text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #8a7a60; }

  /* ========== ATELIERS POUR TOUS (publics redesign) ========== */
  .ateliers { background: var(--beige); }
  .ateliers-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .atelier-card {
    background: var(--white); border-radius: 20px;
    border: 2px solid var(--beige-2);
    box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--beige-2);
    padding: 2rem; overflow: hidden; position: relative;
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .atelier-card:hover { transform: translate(-3px,-3px); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--beige-2); }
  .atelier-card.ac-green { background: var(--green); border-color: var(--green-dark); box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--green-dark); }
  .atelier-card.ac-green:hover { box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--green-dark); }
  .atelier-card.ac-brown { background: var(--brown); border-color: #8f5228; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 #8f5228; }
  .atelier-card.ac-brown:hover { box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 #8f5228; }
  .ac-brown .ac-icon-wrap { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); box-shadow: none; }
  .ac-brown h3 { color: var(--white); }
  .ac-brown p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); }
  .ac-brown .atelier-tag { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: var(--white); }
  .atelier-card .ac-top { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .atelier-card .ac-icon-wrap {
    width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 14px; flex-shrink: 0;
    background: var(--beige); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.6rem;
    box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 var(--beige-2);
  }
  .ac-green .ac-icon-wrap { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); box-shadow: none; }
  .atelier-card h3 { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green-dark); }
  .ac-green h3 { color: var(--white); }
  .atelier-card p { font-size: 0.87rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #5a5040; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .ac-green p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); }
  .atelier-tags { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .atelier-tag {
    background: var(--beige); border: 1px solid var(--beige-2);
    color: var(--green-dark); padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 30px;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
  }
  .ac-green .atelier-tag { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: var(--white); }
  .zone-info {
    margin-top: 2.5rem; display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;
  }
  .zone-pill {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: var(--white); border: 2px solid var(--beige-2);
    border-radius: 30px; padding: 10px 20px;
    box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 var(--beige-2);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green-dark);
  }

  /* ========== GARANTIES ========== */
  .garanties { background: var(--beige-light); padding: 3rem 2rem 3.5rem; }
  .garanties-inner {
    max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .garantie-box {
    background: var(--white); border: 2px solid var(--beige-2); border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--beige-2); padding: 1.8rem 2rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.2rem;
    flex: 1; min-width: 200px; max-width: 320px; transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .garantie-box:hover { transform: translate(-3px,-3px); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--beige-2); }
  .garantie-box.gb-green { background: var(--green); border-color: var(--green-dark); box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--green-dark); }
  .garantie-box.gb-green:hover { box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--green-dark); }
  .garantie-box.gb-brown { background: var(--brown); border-color: #8f5228; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 #8f5228; }
  .garantie-box.gb-brown:hover { box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 #8f5228; }
  .garantie-box .gb-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .gb-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green-dark); margin-bottom: 3px; }
  .gb-green .gb-title, .gb-brown .gb-title { color: var(--white); }
  .gb-sub { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.73rem; color: #7a6a50; }
  .gb-green .gb-sub, .gb-brown .gb-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); }

  /* ========== CONTACT ========== */
  .contact { background: var(--green); }
  .contact .section-title { color: var(--white); }
  .contact .section-label { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.52); }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; margin-top: 2.5rem; }
  .contact-info p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); line-height: 1.82; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 0.97rem; }
  .contact-detail { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 1rem; font-size: 0.93rem; }
  .contact-detail .icon { font-size: 1.1rem; }
  .rc-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 16px; margin-top: 1.5rem;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  }
  .contact-form { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 18px; padding: 2rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }

  /* Audience selector */
  .form-label { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.62); margin-bottom: 0.7rem; display: block; }
  .audience-selector { display: flex; gap: 0.6rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .aud-btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 30px;
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    background: transparent;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer !important; pointer-events: all !important;
    transition: all 0.2s; user-select: none;
    -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none;
  }
  .aud-btn::before {
    content: '';
    width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
    background: transparent;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .aud-btn.active {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); color: var(--white);
  }
  .aud-btn.active::before {
    border-color: var(--beige);
    background: var(--beige);
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 3px rgba(70,123,67,0.8);
  }
  .aud-btn:hover:not(.active) { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); }

  .form-group { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .form-group label { display: block; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.62); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .form-group input, .form-group textarea, .form-group select {
    width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 11px 14px; color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Lora', serif; font-size: 0.93rem; transition: border 0.2s;
  }
  .form-group input::placeholder, .form-group textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); }
  .form-group input:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--beige); }
  .form-group textarea { height: 95px; resize: vertical; }
  .form-group select option { color: #333; background: #fff; }
  .btn-submit {
    width: 100%; background: var(--brown); color: var(--white);
    padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.93rem;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-top: 0.5rem;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-submit:hover { background: #8f5228; }

  /* ========== FOOTER ========== */
  footer {
    background: var(--green-dark); color: rgba(243,222,180,0.55);
    text-align: center; padding: 2rem;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.77rem;
  }
  footer strong { color: var(--beige); }

  /* ========== RESPONSIVE ========== */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .nav-links, .nav-cta { display: none; }
    .hamburger { display: flex; }
    .demarche-grid, .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
    .boite-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .ateliers-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .valeurs-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    section.padded { padding: 60px 1.2rem; }
    .garanties { padding: 2rem 1.2rem; }
    .garantie-box { max-width: 100%; }
    .nav-logo-name { font-size: 1.05rem; }
  }

  
    40% { transform: translateY(-22px) rotate(3deg) scale(1.05); }
    70% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(-1deg); }
  }
    33% { transform: translateY(-18px) rotate(2deg) scale(1.04); }
    66% { transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(-1deg) scale(0.97); }
  }

  /* Stages card full width */ }

  /* ========== AGENDA ========== */
  .agenda-section { background: var(--beige); }
  .agenda-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
  .agenda-card {
    background: var(--white); border-radius: 20px;
    border: 2px solid var(--beige-2); box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--beige-2);
    padding: 2rem; display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: flex-start;
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .agenda-card:hover { transform: translate(-3px,-3px); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--beige-2); }
  .agenda-date {
    flex-shrink: 0; background: var(--green); border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1rem 1.2rem; text-align: center; min-width: 64px;
    box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 var(--green-dark);
  }
  .ag-day { display: block; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--beige); line-height: 1; }
  .ag-month { display: block; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: rgba(243,222,180,0.72); margin-top: 3px; }
  .agenda-label { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--brown); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .agenda-info h3 { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green-dark); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .agenda-info p { font-size: 0.87rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #5a5040; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }
  .agenda-tag { display: inline-block; background: var(--beige); border: 1px solid var(--beige-2); color: var(--green-dark); padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 3px 3px 0 0; }
  .agenda-empty {
    background: rgba(70,123,67,0.06); border: 2px dashed var(--beige-2);
    border-radius: 20px; padding: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .ae-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; }
  .agenda-empty p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: #7a6a50; line-height: 1.65; }
  @media (max-width: 700px) { .agenda-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

  

  
    .stages-photos { width: 100%; }
  }

  



  /* Scattered background photo bubbles */
  .hero-bg-bubbles { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; overflow: hidden; }
  .hbb {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden;
    border: 3px solid rgba(243,222,180,0.25);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    opacity: 0.28;
    animation: hbbFloat 10s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  .hbb img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  /* 4 on left, 4 on right — varied heights & sizes */
  .hbb:nth-child(1) { width:120px; height:120px; top:8%;   left:5%;   animation-delay:0s; }
  .hbb:nth-child(2) { width:100px; height:100px; top:38%;  left:5.5%;   animation-delay:2s;  opacity:0.22; }
  .hbb:nth-child(3) { width:110px; height:110px; top:66%;  left:4%; animation-delay:5s;  opacity:0.20; }
  .hbb:nth-child(4) { width: 90px; height: 90px; bottom:6%;left:16%;  animation-delay:7s;  opacity:0.17; }
  .hbb:nth-child(5) { width:130px; height:130px; top:6%;   right:5%;  animation-delay:1s; }
  .hbb:nth-child(6) { width:105px; height:105px; top:36%;  right:5.5%;animation-delay:3.5s;opacity:0.22; }
  .hbb:nth-child(7) { width:115px; height:115px; top:64%;  right:4%;animation-delay:6s;  opacity:0.20; }
  .hbb:nth-child(8) { width: 95px; height: 95px; bottom:5%;right:16%; animation-delay:8.5s;opacity:0.17; }
  @keyframes hbbFloat {
    0%,100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); }
    40%     { transform: translateY(-16px) rotate(2deg); }
    70%     { transform: translateY(-6px) rotate(-1deg); }
  }
  @media (max-width: 700px) {
    .hbb:nth-child(3),.hbb:nth-child(4),.hbb:nth-child(7),.hbb:nth-child(8) { display:none; }
  }
  /* Stages card — full width horizontal */
  .stages-card { grid-column: 1 / -1 !important; }
  .stages-card .stages-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:2.5rem; }
  .stages-card .stages-text { flex:1; }
  .stages-card .stages-badge {
    flex-shrink:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;
    gap:0.5rem; padding:1.5rem; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius:16px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); min-width:120px;
  }
  .stages-card .stages-badge .sb-icon { font-size:3rem; }
  .stages-card .stages-badge span { font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:700; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75); text-align:center; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; }
  @media(max-width:700px){ .stages-card .stages-row { flex-direction:column; } }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ========== HERO ========== -->
<section class="hero" id="accueil">
  <div class="hero-bg-bubbles">
    <div class="hbb"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></div>
    <div class="hbb"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></div>
    <div class="hbb"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></div>
    <div class="hbb"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></div>
    <div class="hbb"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></div>
    <div class="hbb"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></div>
    <div class="hbb"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></div>
    <div class="hbb"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""></div>
  </div>


  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge">📍 Saône-et-Loire & alentours</div>
    
    <h1>Éco<span class="accent">curieux</span></h1>
    <h2>Animation nature & biodiversité</h2>
    <p>Des expériences pédagogiques au cœur du vivant, observer, manipuler, comprendre et créer un vrai lien avec la nature.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#services" class="btn-primary">Découvrir les animations</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline">Demander un devis</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <a href="#services" class="hero-scroll">
    <span class="scroll-label">Découvrir</span>
    <span class="scroll-arrow">↓</span>
  </a>
</section>

<!-- ========== TICKER (entre hero et services) ========== -->
<div class="ticker">
  <div class="ticker-inner">
    <span class="t-anim">🦔 Animations sur site</span>
    <span class="t-proj">✏️ Projets sur mesure</span>
    <span class="t-kit">🦗 Location de kits pédagogiques</span>
    <span class="t-eco">🏫 Écoles & crèches</span>
    <span class="t-coll">🏛 Collectivités</span>
    <span class="t-event">🎪 Événements grand public</span>
    <span class="t-stage">📔 Stages nature</span>
    <span class="t-bird">🐦 Ornithologie</span>
    <span class="t-anim">🦔 Animations sur site</span>
    <span class="t-proj">✏️ Projets sur mesure</span>
    <span class="t-kit">🦗 Location de kits pédagogiques</span>
    <span class="t-eco">🏫 Écoles & crèches</span>
    <span class="t-coll">🏛 Collectivités</span>
    <span class="t-event">🎪 Événements grand public</span>
    <span class="t-stage">📔 Stages nature</span>
    <span class="t-bird">🐦 Ornithologie</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ========== SERVICES ========== -->
<section class="padded services" id="services">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Ce que je propose</div>
    <div class="section-title">Des animations <span>vivantes</span> et sur mesure</div>
    <div class="services-grid">
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon-wrap">🦔</div>
        <h3>Animations nature & biodiversité</h3>
        <p>Des séances d'observation et d'expérimentation adaptées à chaque âge, faune, flore, insectes, oiseaux. Le vivant comme terrain de jeu et d'apprentissage.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card card-green" id="kits">
        <div class="service-icon-wrap">🦗</div>
        <h3>Location de kits pédagogiques</h3>
        <p>Couveuse pédagogique, kits insectes, petits animaux (cochons d'Inde, lapins), supports pédagogiques. Chaque kit est accompagné de conseils et recommandations pour le bien-être animal.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card card-brown">
        <div class="service-icon-wrap">🏫</div>
        <h3>Interventions sur site</h3>
        <p>J'interviens directement dans votre établissement ou sur les lieux d'événements avec tout le matériel. Animations adaptées au contexte, aux participants et à vos objectifs.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card" id="projets">
        <div class="service-icon-wrap">✏️</div>
        <h3>Projets sur mesure</h3>
        <p>Vous avez une idée précise ou un besoin particulier ? Je co-construis avec vous un projet pédagogique sur plusieurs séances, adapté à votre public, votre lieu et vos contraintes.</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Card 5, stages, pleine largeur horizontale -->
      <div class="service-card card-green stages-card" id="stages">
        <div class="stages-row">
          <div class="stages-badge">
            <span class="sb-icon">📔</span>
            <span>Stages<br>nature</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stages-text">
            <h3>Stages nature &amp; cahier buissonnier</h3>
            <p>Une immersion d'une demi-journée ou d'une journée pour se reconnecter au vivant. Je vous fournis votre carnet de terrain personnel pour explorer la biodiversité locale à travers l'observation et la création : réalisation d'herbiers, inventaires d'insectes ou croquis d'oiseaux. Un mélange ludique de science et de contemplation pour apprendre à lire le paysage, et repartir avec votre précieux carnet illustré par vos soins.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ========== DEMARCHE ========== -->
<section class="padded demarche" id="demarche">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="demarche-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="section-label">Ma démarche</div>
        <div class="section-title">Une approche unique <span style="color:var(--brown)">pour chaque projet</span></div>
        
        <p style="color:rgba(243,222,180,0.65);font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;font-style:italic">Les 3 piliers de mon action :</p>
        <div class="pilliers">
          <div class="pillier">
            <h4>🔬 La Vulgarisation Scientifique</h4>
            <p>J'adapte les notions complexes de l'écologie et de la biodiversité en expériences simples, ludiques et accessibles à tous.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="pillier">
            <h4>🌍 L'Adaptation au Terrain</h4>
            <p>Mes ateliers sont créés sur mesure et adaptés à votre quotidien et votre environnement (parc, jardin, cour d'école, etc.).</p>
          </div>
          <div class="pillier">
            <h4>🤝 La Co-construction</h4>
            <p>Que vous soyez une école, une mairie ou un particulier, nous travaillons ensemble de façon à définir vos objectifs pédagogiques et créer une animation qui vous ressemble.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="demarche-visual">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Écocurieux" style="width:190px;height:auto;display:block;margin:0 auto 1.5rem;border-radius:14px;">
        <div class="demarche-quote">
          <p>"Parce que la Nature ne se lit pas seulement dans les livres, je vous aide à la vivre au quotidien."</p>
          <cite>, Amandine Junier-Dubus</cite>
        </div>
        <div class="valeurs-grid">
          <div class="valeur"><div class="vi">🌸</div><span>Pédagogie accessible</span></div>
          <div class="valeur"><div class="vi">⏳</div><span>Respect du rythme</span></div>
          <div class="valeur"><div class="vi">🔍</div><span>Observation concrète</span></div>
          <div class="valeur"><div class="vi">💚</div><span>Sans culpabilisation</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ========== BOITE A IDEES ========== -->
<section class="padded boite" id="boite">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Thématiques disponibles</div>
    <div class="section-title">La <span>Boîte à idées</span></div>
    <p style="color:#6b5a40;font-size:0.97rem;line-height:1.75;max-width:650px;margin-bottom:0">Des pistes pour construire votre projet ludique</p>
    <div class="boite-grid">
      <div class="univers-card">
        <div class="univers-head">
          <div class="u-icon">🦅</div>
          <h3>L'Univers des Naturalistes</h3>
        </div>
        <ul class="univers-list">
          <li><strong>Ornithologie :</strong> S'initier à l'écoute et à l'identification des oiseaux.</li>
          <li><strong>Le Petit Peuple de l'Herbe :</strong> Plongée dans le monde des insectes et invertébrés.</li>
          <li><strong>L'Herbier Créatif :</strong> Science et art pour identifier et conserver les plantes.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="univers-card u-green">
        <div class="univers-head">
          <div class="u-icon">🔭</div>
          <h3>L'Univers des Scientifiques</h3>
        </div>
        <ul class="univers-list">
          <li><strong>Sensibilisation aux différents écosystèmes.</strong></li>
          <li><strong>Niches Écologiques & Réseaux Trophiques :</strong> "Qui mange quoi ?" et le rôle de chacun.</li>
          <li><strong>L'Odyssée des Animaux :</strong> Découverte de la faune, de leurs besoins et de leur lien avec l'humain.</li>
          <li><strong>Labo-Natur :</strong> Expériences de vulgarisation des phénomènes naturels.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="univers-card u-brown">
        <div class="univers-head">
          <div class="u-icon">✨</div>
          <h3>L'Univers des Rêveurs</h3>
        </div>
        <ul class="univers-list">
          <li><strong>Balades Contées :</strong> Quand les savoirs naturalistes rencontrent les légendes.</li>
          <li><strong>Éveil Sensoriel :</strong> Toucher, sentir, écouter pour se reconnecter au vivant.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ========== ATELIERS POUR TOUS ========== -->
<section class="padded ateliers" id="ateliers">

      <div class="atelier-card">

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ========== AGENDA ========== -->
<section class="padded agenda-section" id="agenda">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Événements & sorties</div>
    <div class="section-title">À venir <span>grand public</span></div>
    <p style="color:#6b5a40;font-size:0.97rem;line-height:1.75;max-width:650px;margin-bottom:2.5rem">Je participe à des événements ouverts à tous, gratuits, pour partager la nature avec le plus grand nombre !</p>
    <div class="agenda-grid">
      <div class="agenda-card">
        <div class="agenda-date"><span class="ag-day">8</span><span class="ag-month">Juillet</span></div>

          <h3>Port de plaisance de Chalon-sur-Saône</h3>
          <p>Venez découvrir et identifier les oiseaux de notre région lors de cette journée nature conviviale. Animations, observations aux jumelles, échanges avec des naturalistes passionnés.</p>

          <span class="agenda-tag">👨‍👩‍👧 Tout public</span>
          <span class="agenda-tag">📍 Chalon-sur-Saône</span>
        </div>

        <p>D'autres événements à venir…<br><em>Suivez l'actualité ou contactez-moi pour en savoir plus !</em></p>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ========== CONTACT ========== -->
<section class="padded contact" id="contact">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Parlons de votre projet</div>
    <div class="section-title">Me <span style="color:var(--beige)">contacter</span></div>
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div class="contact-info">
        <p>Vous souhaitez en savoir plus, obtenir un devis ou discuter d'un projet ? Contactez-moi directement, je vous réponds personnellement.</p>
        <div class="contact-detail"><span class="icon">📞</span> 06.69.49.18.23</div>
        <div class="contact-detail"><span class="icon">✉️</span> <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#ceafa3afa0aaa7a0aba4aa8ea1bbbaa2a1a1a5e0ada1a3" style="color:var(--white);text-decoration:none"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="3d5c505c535954535857597d52484951525256135e5250">[email&#160;protected]</span></a></div>
        <div class="contact-detail"><span class="icon">📍</span> Saône-et-Loire & alentours</div>

          ✅ Assurance Responsabilité Civile Professionnelle
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-form">
        <span class="form-label">Vous êtes :</span>
        <div class="audience-selector" id="audSelector">
          <button type="button" class="aud-btn active" data-val="ecole" onclick="selectAud(this)">🏫 École / structure</button>
          <button type="button" class="aud-btn" data-val="collectivite" onclick="selectAud(this)">🏛 Collectivité</button>
          <button type="button" class="aud-btn" data-val="particulier" onclick="selectAud(this)">👨‍👩‍👧 Particulier</button>
          <button type="button" class="aud-btn" data-val="autre" onclick="selectAud(this)">🙋 Autre</button>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Votre nom</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="Prénom Nom">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Email</label>
          <input type="email" placeholder="votre@email.fr">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Type de projet</label>
          <select>
            <option>Animation nature</option>
            <option>Location de kit pédagogique</option>
            <option>Projet sur mesure</option>
            <option>Événement / collectivité</option>
            <option>Anniversaire nature</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Votre message</label>
          <textarea placeholder="Décrivez votre projet, votre public, vos dates…"></textarea>
        </div>
        <button class="btn-submit">🌿 Envoyer ma demande</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p><strong>Écocurieux</strong> · Animation nature & biodiversité · Amandine Junier-Dubus</p>
  <p style="margin-top:6px;">© 2026 · Saône-et-Loire · <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="6e0f030f000a07000b040a2e011b1a02010105400d0103">[email&#160;protected]</a></p>
</footer>
<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
function toggleMenu() {
  document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.toggle('open');
}
function selectAud(btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#audSelector .aud-btn').forEach(function(b) {
    b.classList.remove('active');
  });
  btn.classList.add('active');
}
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  var m = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
  var h = document.querySelector('.hamburger');
  if (m && m.classList.contains('open') && h && !m.contains(e.target) && !h.contains(e.target)) {
    m.classList.remove('open');
  }
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
